jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Rivigo
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Rivigo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
